name: seconds-clock
title: Seconds Clock
description: A minimal digital clock with always-visible seconds for Raycast.
author: hyder

commands.name: show-seconds-clock
commands.title: Show Seconds Clock
commands.description: Show a live digital clock with seconds.

commands.name: toggle-menu-bar-clock
commands.title: Toggle Menu Bar Clock
commands.description: Show or hide the Seconds Clock menu bar item.

commands.name: menu-bar-clock
commands.title: Menu Bar Clock
commands.description: Render the live Seconds Clock menu bar item.

preferences.name: timeFormat
preferences.title: Time Format
preferences.description: Choose whether the clock uses a 12-hour or 24-hour format.
